what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment in the design-assets channel, declaring an image-type attachment whose target is the image://design-assets/icons/Icon_Gold_Unique asset.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no prose body.
The target field uses an image:// URI pointing to design-assets/icons/Icon_Gold_Unique.
It includes an added timestamp in ISO 8601 format.
The file name follows the att-<uuid>.md pattern.
standouts: The target is an image:// URI rather than a filesystem path.
There is no body content beyond the frontmatter.
It links a generic attachment record to a specific named icon asset.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Names the file with an att- prefix and a UUID.
Represents the attachment target with a scheme-based URI.
concerns: No context about which message or channel entry this attachment belongs to.
No dimensions, format, alt text, or uploader metadata for the image.
The image:// URI cannot be resolved or validated from this file alone.
notes: A bare attachment ledger entry that points an image-type attachment record at a specific design-assets icon URI.
questions: Which channel message or entry is this attachment attached to?
What does Icon_Gold_Unique depict and what are its dimensions/format?
Is image://design-assets/icons/Icon_Gold_Unique resolvable by the consuming system?
Who added this attachment and why?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is an attachment record for images, and the file does exactly that by listing an image target and type, so it matches.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a persistent, timestamped record that a particular icon image asset is associated with the design-assets channel as an attachment.
novelty: The use of an image:// scheme target and the total absence of body content make it a very lightweight, scheme-referenced attachment record.
contribution: A concrete, timestamped record that an image attachment named Icon_Gold_Unique exists in the design-assets channel, with a typed attachment classification and a URI target.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment record in the design-assets channel pointing an images-type attachment to image://design-assets/icons/Icon_Gold_Unique with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog an image attachment reference for a specific icon asset in the design-assets channel memory.
